title: Punjab National Bank PNB Local Bank Officer LBO Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 545 Post
excerpt: Punjab National Bank PNB has released the notification for the recruitment of Local Bank Officer LBO Exam 2026. Interested candidates can apply online from 20/07/2026 to 09/08/2026. The exam will be conducted in August/September 2026.
value_prop: _Apply now for the Punjab National Bank PNB Local Bank Officer LBO Recruitment 2026 and take the first step towards a rewarding career in banking_

About Organization

Punjab National Bank PNB is a leading public sector bank in India. The bank has a long history of providing excellent banking services to its customers.

Punjab National Bank PNB has released the notification for the recruitment of Local Bank Officer LBO Exam 2026.

About the Programme

The Local Bank Officer LBO Recruitment 2026 is a job opportunity for Indian citizens to work with Punjab National Bank PNB.

The recruitment process will be conducted in August/September 2026.
